bead.title: code-health: split Server.mcpTools (627-LOC flat list) into per-domain builders
bead.description:
PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE: cli/internal/server/server.go:3265 Server.mcpTools is a single 627-LOC method returning a flat slice of mcpTool literals.

PROPOSED FIX: Split into per-domain builder functions (beadMcpTools(), docMcpTools(), etc.) concatenated by mcpTools. Pure data-list partition, no schema/behavior change.

NON-SCOPE: no tool behavior/schema changes. Behavior-preserving.
bead.acceptance:
1. mcpTools body < 80 LOC, delegating to per-domain builders.
2. The returned tool set (names, schemas) is identical — assert via the existing MCP tools-list test.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
